_meta.notes: Branch II resolves at end of Book II.

title: What the Door Was For
theme: the new door has someone behind it; or the new door has nothing behind it; the year decides
worldEvent: Branch II resolves: the door's purpose becomes a fact
narratorPromptFragment: The current world-chapter is BOOK II, CHAPTER 4: WHAT THE DOOR WAS FOR. The door from chapter 6 has someone behind it now. Or it doesn't. The year is about to decide. Reference the door if natural; otherwise reference a deciding-feeling — a coin spinning, a held breath, a held breath stopped.
